title: Could eva be improved if Kaji and Fuyutsuki merged
display_title: Could eva be improved if Kaji and Fuyutsuki merged
wikitext:
[]: Could eva be improved if Kaji and Fuyutsuki merged? Post by orcot » Mon Jan 04, 2021 12:59 pm It seems to me (that if you wanted to make the story more compact) you could make Kaji and Fuyutsuki the same person. Improvments to the story. -Misato's: I both dated you and broke up with you because you remind me of my father, works better with the large age difference. -Misato having relationship issues and a weird sex live work better this way. (she only has 1 lover during the course of the series so it's weird even mentioning it). - Fuyutsuki like Kaji have a similar search for answers at the beginning of them joining NERV. - Whilst Asuka does not like Misato she never sabotaged their relation this is weird behaviour for Asuka in stead she could fall from one of tech's like Shigeru - Fuyutsuki being a glorified biology/philospohy professor is perhaps more suited to talk philospohy whilst mending a potager. - Misato and Ritsuko have at least one thing in common. What would be the cons? Is their any decend reason story wise why the 2 can't be the same person?

[]: Re: Could eva be improved if Kaji and Fuyutsuki merged? Post by Kendrix » Tue Jan 05, 2021 4:39 pm I'd agree that out of all the main characters Fuyutsuki is probably the most droppable, with probably the least important decisions,memorable moments or flavor-adding thematic characteristics. If it were a book or a comic, most of his functions could be taken over by narration, but in a "real time" medium like film or animation, information needs to be put in dialogue form, so, Gendo needs someone to talk to. PoV wise he contributes something "more humane & less jaded than Gendo" which Misato could also do, though it would probably shift the equilibrium if we saw them interact more. In the ep where he appears most, 21, his role is also dictated by functionality & framing: We need someone to narrate the flashbacks who isn't Yui or Gendo, because those two have to remain opaque, their thoughts something the audience can only guess at. The most unique flavor that he adds is probably that sadness & nostalgia for the old world & its old standards, "Rip autumn, so we need to draw new maps again, poor mother earth". So I guess this could be tighter, but, side characters are not a bad thing & can broaden the world. I don't think the solution would be merging them at all tho, because none of this applies to Kaji. He's a side character, but he's crucial , in the same way as Touji & Kaworu. It's important that he briefly form a sort of pseudo family-unit with Misato, Shinji and Asuka, acting as a mentor to the kids - the "life lesson scenes" must absolutely be in there. He's also the only main character who is a complete outsider to the conspiracy, his parents weren't involved etc. That's a crucial pov that can't be removed - if anything, I'd utilize it more (like the manga sort of did) - Kaji can't be older, it's crucial that he lived through second impact as a young age. Also why this might be wrangled away creatively, their roles aren't really the same, Fuyutsuki tried to uncover the truth but then he joined the conspiracy and watches it impotently/ tacitly accepts it so he'll get his part. Maybe he hopes Yui will fix it. He's not very brave. Kaji's a lot more selfish, he wants answers for himself and despite his double agent game he never truly 'joins' anywhere. If you look at the younger generation, Fuyutsuki would be the closest to Shinji while Kaji would be the closest to Mari. Or perhaps Kaji is what Fuyutsuki would be if he had guts. orcot wrote: -Misato's: I both dated you and broke up with you because you remind me of my father, works better with the large age difference. -Misato having relationship issues and a weird sex live work better this way. (she only has 1 lover during the course of the series so it's weird even mentioning it).

[]: Re: Could eva be improved if Kaji and Fuyutsuki merged? Post by Derantor » Tue Jan 05, 2021 6:28 pm orcot wrote: What would be the cons? Is their there any decend decent reason story wise why the 2 can't be the same person?

[]: Re: Could eva be improved if Kaji and Fuyutsuki merged? Post by Blockio » Tue Jan 05, 2021 6:29 pm This thread had a complete trainwreck of a starter post, and knowing orcot's history with these threads, it is only going to get worse. Kendrix has answered everything there was to answer and Deranator has given a detailed example to why the starting question is completely and utterly stupid. This thread is getting locked.
